statement.title: Statement
statement.content:
Input Format
The only line of the input contains a single integer $ n $ ( $ 1 \leq n \leq 25 $ ).

Examples
Sample 1
Input
1
Output
YES

Sample 2
Input
15
Output
NO

solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
1812B - Was it Rated?
The input to the problem represents a Codeforces contest ID. Out of the first $$$25$$$ Codeforces contests, the only unrated ones had IDs $$$15$$$, $$$20$$$, and $$$21$$$.
So we output
NO
if $$$n \in \{15, 20, 21\}$$$, and
YES
otherwise.
